---
title: "OpenPipeline"
subtitle: "Best-practice pipelines for single-cell and spatial data."
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

Modular, containerized components and reproducible Nextflow workflows — from raw
counts to an integrated, annotated object.

**Modalities:** RNA · Protein (ADT) · ATAC · VDJ · GDO · Spatial

[▸ Run your first pipeline](get-started/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[How it works](concepts/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## The pipeline

Every workflow follows the same shape. Single-cell and spatial share it; the
satellite packages extend a step or wrap the whole thing.

### Single-cell

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A["1 · Ingestion<br/>cellranger_multi · demux"] -->
  B["2 · Process samples<br/>filter · normalize · HVG"] -->
  C["3 · Integration<br/>harmony · scVI · totalVI"] -->
  D["4 · Downstream<br/>annotation · diff. expression"]
```

### Spatial

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A["1 · Ingestion<br/>spaceranger_mapping"] -->
  B["2 · Process samples<br/>spatial_process_samples"] -->
  C["3 · Neighbors<br/>find_neighbors · leiden"] -->
  D["4 · Niches<br/>nichecompass"]
```

## Three ways in

::: {layout-ncol=3}

::: {.card}
#### 🧪 New to single-cell
Install, run a real pipeline on provided test data, and learn to read the output.
[Get started →](get-started/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.card}
#### 🔬 Bioinformatician
Copy-paste how-tos: ingest 10x or Xenium, integrate with Harmony, run QC reports.
[Browse guides →](guides/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.card}
#### ⚡ Power user
Every workflow and module, grouped by task, with full parameter listings.
[Open reference →](reference/index.qmd)
:::

:::

## Run it your way

Every workflow is a [Viash](https://viash.io)-built, containerized Nextflow
pipeline — so the same run works on your laptop, on Seqera, or through the
[Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com) web interface.

| Where | How | Requires |
|---|---|---|
| **Local** | Nextflow + Docker on your machine or HPC | nextflow · docker |
| **Seqera Platform** | Managed cloud runs (AWS/Azure/GCP) | a compute environment |
| **Viash Hub** | Launch from a guided web form — no CLI | a browser |

: {tbl-colwidths="[20,55,25]"}

---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
This site is a **draft rebuild** of the OpenPipeline documentation. A clickable
design mockup lives in [`design/mockup.html`](design/mockup.html).
:::
